settings.rating_text: Trusted by 2,000+ dog owners across Europe
settings.heading: 6 reasons your dog's body will love it
settings.subline: One daily scoop that supports joints, digestion, coat and calm — not six different supplements.

settings.title: Easier movement, day after day
settings.text: Glucosamine and omega-3s help cushion the joints, so stairs, walks and jumping back onto the couch feel less like hard work.

settings.title: A calmer, happier gut
settings.text: Prebiotic fibre feeds the good bacteria, helping firm up stools and settle a sensitive tummy — no more guessing after every meal.

settings.title: A shinier, fuller coat
settings.text: Zinc, biotin and essential fats work from the inside out for a softer coat and less shedding on the sofa.

settings.title: More settled, less on edge
settings.text: Gentle adaptogens take the edge off everyday stress — car rides, visitors and thunderstorms feel a little less dramatic.

settings.title: Quiet support for the immune system
settings.text: Antioxidants and functional mushrooms help the body do what it already does — just with a bit more backup.

settings.title: One scoop replaces the whole shelf
settings.text: Everything in a single tasty scoop over food. No pill battles, no five different tubs — just one step at breakfast.

settings.heading: 6 reasons your dog's body will love it
settings.subheading: Real, everyday changes you can actually notice — not a long list of ingredients.

settings.title: Getting started
settings.text: Your dog gets used to the taste and the gut begins to adjust. Early days are simply the body settling in.

settings.title: First signs
settings.text: Firmer digestion and a bit more spring in everyday movement. Small wins you start to notice.

settings.title: Hitting its stride
settings.text: Coat looks healthier, mood feels steadier, and the daily routine just works. This is where it clicks.

settings.heading: What to expect after you start
settings.subheading: Every dog is different — this is a typical rhythm, not a promise.
